title: Comet ATX Hard Reset Validation
summary: Student validates Comet ATX hard reset behavior and documents safe power-control evidence.
student_goal: Confirm that Comet ATX power control behaves as expected and that recovery evidence is documented.

required_evidence.label: Pre-reset check
required_evidence.description: Student must document system state before reset.

required_evidence.label: Reset action evidence
required_evidence.description: Student must document the ATX reset or power-control action.

required_evidence.label: Post-reset recovery check
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm the system recovered after reset.

opening_questions: What system state did you confirm before reset?
What exact power-control action did you perform?
What evidence shows the system recovered correctly?
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not recommend hard reset before pre-check evidence is captured.
